## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss progress on Tribe AI's content strategy and align on next steps for publishing and future topics.](https://fathom.video/share/j2G-XMhuAhxZGDy1pXqpfkb_S2MqKGu3?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Jaclyn acknowledged challenges in reviewing content due to time constraints and personal preferences](https://fathom.video/share/j2G-XMhuAhxZGDy1pXqpfkb_S2MqKGu3?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)
  - [Team agreed to move forward with publishing the current piece after minimal edits](https://fathom.video/share/j2G-XMhuAhxZGDy1pXqpfkb_S2MqKGu3?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [Tribe AI to provide brand guidelines and additional collateral to support content creation](https://fathom.video/share/j2G-XMhuAhxZGDy1pXqpfkb_S2MqKGu3?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)
  - [Future topics to focus less on regulation/compliance, more on industry trends and Tribe AI's unique perspectives](https://fathom.video/share/j2G-XMhuAhxZGDy1pXqpfkb_S2MqKGu3?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)

## Topics

### Content Review Process

  - [Jaclyn admitted difficulty in reviewing long-form content due to time constraints and not being the target audience](https://fathom.video/share/j2G-XMhuAhxZGDy1pXqpfkb_S2MqKGu3?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)
  - [Emphasized need for an in-house marketer at Tribe AI to serve as main point of contact](https://fathom.video/share/j2G-XMhuAhxZGDy1pXqpfkb_S2MqKGu3?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Team agreed to prioritize momentum over perfection in content creation](https://fathom.video/share/j2G-XMhuAhxZGDy1pXqpfkb_S2MqKGu3?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### Current Article Status

  - [Jaclyn made minimal edits and comments](https://fathom.video/share/j2G-XMhuAhxZGDy1pXqpfkb_S2MqKGu3?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
  - [Content deemed mostly accurate and ready for publication with slight tweaks](https://fathom.video/share/j2G-XMhuAhxZGDy1pXqpfkb_S2MqKGu3?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
  - [Article to be published in the blog section of Tribe AI's website](https://fathom.video/share/j2G-XMhuAhxZGDy1pXqpfkb_S2MqKGu3?tab=summary&timestamp=1076.0)

### Future Content Strategy

  - [Shift away from compliance/regulation topics](https://fathom.video/share/j2G-XMhuAhxZGDy1pXqpfkb_S2MqKGu3?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)
  - [Explore Tribe AI's forecasts for 2025 and beyond (non-regulation focused)](https://fathom.video/share/j2G-XMhuAhxZGDy1pXqpfkb_S2MqKGu3?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
  - [Consider creating content around recent events like AWS re:Invent conference](https://fathom.video/share/j2G-XMhuAhxZGDy1pXqpfkb_S2MqKGu3?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)
  - [Leverage Jaclyn's speaking engagements and company activities for content ideas](https://fathom.video/share/j2G-XMhuAhxZGDy1pXqpfkb_S2MqKGu3?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)

### Team Changes and Collaboration

  - [Introduced Jess Scott, new to GrowthX, who will be leading Tribe AI account starting new year](https://fathom.video/share/j2G-XMhuAhxZGDy1pXqpfkb_S2MqKGu3?tab=summary&timestamp=53.0)
  - [Discussed restructuring of GrowthX into pod teams for improved efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/j2G-XMhuAhxZGDy1pXqpfkb_S2MqKGu3?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)

### Visual Assets and Brand Guidelines

  - [Jaclyn committed to providing brand guidelines and additional collateral from Tribe AI's design channel](https://fathom.video/share/j2G-XMhuAhxZGDy1pXqpfkb_S2MqKGu3?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)
  - [GrowthX team plans to create infographics and visuals based on the content](https://fathom.video/share/j2G-XMhuAhxZGDy1pXqpfkb_S2MqKGu3?tab=summary&timestamp=1218.0)

### Contract and Payment

  - [Jaclyn mentioned a payment made on November 26th](https://fathom.video/share/j2G-XMhuAhxZGDy1pXqpfkb_S2MqKGu3?tab=summary&timestamp=1308.0)
  - [Team to confirm contract timeline and current status](https://fathom.video/share/j2G-XMhuAhxZGDy1pXqpfkb_S2MqKGu3?tab=summary&timestamp=1324.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jaclyn to provide brand guidelines and additional collateral via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/j2G-XMhuAhxZGDy1pXqpfkb_S2MqKGu3?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
  - [GrowthX to proceed with publishing the current article after minimal edits](https://fathom.video/share/j2G-XMhuAhxZGDy1pXqpfkb_S2MqKGu3?tab=summary&timestamp=1056.0)
  - [Team to explore new content topics based on recent events and Tribe AI's unique perspectives](https://fathom.video/share/j2G-XMhuAhxZGDy1pXqpfkb_S2MqKGu3?tab=summary&timestamp=875.0)
  - [Andrej to confirm contract details with Marcel and Jimmy](https://fathom.video/share/j2G-XMhuAhxZGDy1pXqpfkb_S2MqKGu3?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)
